trails.name: Roaring stag to cattle ridge hut track
South ohau hut to girdlestone saddle
trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.name: Blackwater junction to south ohau hut
trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.name: Poads rd to blackwater junction
trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.name: Pukematawai to arete
trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.name: Waiohine pinnacles to tarn ridge hut
trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.name: Tarn ridge hut to mitre

trails.name: Mitre to mitre flats hut
trails.description: One of four classic tramps in the Tararuas, the Northern Crossing links the Ohau and Waingawa catchments. Depending on weather conditions it can take between 3 to 5 days to complete. It is recommended for experienced trampers only.

trails.name: Fensham reserve
trails.description:
The tracks take you through a variety of terrain: along wetland boardwalks, through native bush and up to a hilltop with views of rolling farmland. You're likely to spot Tuis, Fantails and 500-year-old trees along the way.

The main loop walk takes

trails.name: MID WAIOHINE HUT TO AOKAPARANGI JUNCTION
CONE PEAK TO MT HECTOR -NEILL WINCHCOMBE
Mangapuaka stm to Matanginui high point
RAPARAPAWAI STM TO MATANGINUI VIA KIRITA
PARATA TRACK
trails.description: Parata Track passes through kohekohe forest to a lookout with views of the coast, Kapiti Island, and the Reikorangi Valley.

trails.name: MID POHANGINA TK TO TAKAPARI ROAD VIA CE
TE EKAOU HUT TO FORKS HUT TK
CATTLE RIDGE HUT TO DUNDAS HUT
RIVER RIDGE TRACK
trails.description: This track connects Atiwhakatu Valley with Mountain House Shelter. It is more challenging than the Gentle Annie Track.

trails.name: MITRE PEAK TRACK
trails.description: Tramp from Mitre Flats to the bush line of Pukeamoamo/Mitre Peak.

trails.name: NEILL FORKS HUT TO MAUNGAHUKA HUT
MAKAHIKA BUSH EDGE TO MANGAHAO ROAD
CARNIVAL PARK SCENIC RESERVE WALKING TRA
BLUE RANGE HUT TO COW CREEK HUT
GLADSTONE ROAD TO MAKAHIKA BUSH EDGE
ARCUS LOOP TRACK
trails.description: This is an easy loop track near Ōtaki. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: CARPARK TO KAITAWA STREAM MILL SITE
KOHEKOHE WALK - KAKARIKI GROVE TO TUI C
Gibbons o/night carpark to Parawai Lodge
PAPAITONGA TRACK
trails.description: Take a short, easy walk around a dune lake in Papaitonga Scenic Reserve. It has great spots to enjoy views and look for and listen to birds and is a good option for kids.

trails.name: ATIWHAKATU TRACK
trails.description: A good overnight option for people new to tramping, leading from Holdsworth road end to Atiwhakatu Hut.

trails.name: KIRIWHAKAPAPA LOOP TRACK
trails.description: This well-graded, family-friendly loop track passes through regenerated native forest.

trails.name: MANGAONE W/WAY - KAITAWA SR TO MANGAONE
BARRA TRACK - THE PINES TO BLAKE STREAM
EAST HOLDSWORTH TRACK
trails.description: This track connects Atiwhakatu Valley with the alpine tops near Mt Holsworth. It is a more challenging track than the main track to Mt Holdsworth via Powell Hut.

trails.name: KIRIWHAKAPAPA TO BLUE RANGE HUT
trails.description: Tramp from Kiriwhakapapa road end to Blue Range Hut, a quirky hut with great views.

trails.name: COW TO CLEFT CREEKS/COW SADDLE TO CATTLE
MOUNT HOLDSWORTH TO MID WAIOHINE HUT
BARRA TRACK - BLAKE STREAM TERRACE TO MI
GABLE END - RICHARDS KNOB TO OHAU TRACK
FOREST PARK BOUNDARY TO OLD OHAU SHELTER
ANDERSON MEMORIAL HUT TO MAUNGAHUKA HUT
TOTARA FLATS HUT TO NEILL FORKS HUT
COW CREEK HUT TO ARETE FORKS HUT TO PINN
SNOWY RIVER BRIDGE TO MAYMORN JUNCTION
FENCELINE TRACK TO SNOWY RIVER BRIDGE
Mt Thompson to Waitohu Road End
LOWER WAIOHINE TRACK
trails.description: This track leads from the Waiohine road end to Totara Flats Hut. It is a good overnight trip.

trails.name: SOUTH OHAU HUT TO YEATES/DORA JUNCTION
ATIWHAKATU HUT TO MITRE FLATS HUT
MANGAHAO FLATS HUT TO GIRDLESTONE SADDLE
CONE SADDLE TO CONE PEAK-CONE RIDGE
JUMBO HUT TO UPPER ATIWHAKATU ROUTE
CONE SADDLE SIDE TRACK TO CONE HUT
NGATIAWA ROAD END TO KAPAKAPANUI HUT
Otaki Forks Plateau to YTYY hut
KAIPARORO - PARK BOUNDARY TO KAIPARORO T
RUAMAHANGA - FOREST PARK BOUNDARY TO COW
COPPERMINE LOOP TK TO MANGAATUA STM TK
FENCELINE WALK
trails.description: An easy walking track near Ōtaki. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: DONNELLY FLAT LOOP WALK
trails.description: The track to Donnelly Flat passes through some of the best mixed podocarp/broadleaf forest in the Tararua Range - this short, easy walk with a picnic area and stream on route is an great option for kids.

trails.name: MANGAONE W/WAY - MANGAONE SOUTH RD TO KA
HARRIS CREEK TO MANGAHAO FLATS HUT
PENN CREEK HUT TO TABLE TOP
LOWER RUAMAHANGA - MT BRUCE TO FOREST PA
ROARING STAG TO CATTLE RIDGE HUT
ROARING STAG TRACK
trails.description: Tramp from Putara Road end over a ridge and into the Ruamahanga Valley, to Roaring Stag Hut.

trails.name: TE AU TRACK
trails.description: The track climbs to 521 m and offers panoramic views of the Waikanae Estuary and Kapiti Island.

trails.name: Pukeatua Track
trails.description: Pukeatua Track connects Otaki Forks to Waikanae. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Burtton's Track
trails.description: Burtton's Track (Scotts Road to Mangahao Road) lies between Palmerston North and Shannon. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Coppermine Road End tramping tracks
trails.description: You can get to Wharite Peak Track and Coppermine Track from Coppermine Road End in  Eastern Ruahine Forest Park.

trails.name: Field Hut and Table Top
trails.description: The day trip to Table Top is the classic climb to the tops of the western Tararua Range.

trails.name: Gentle Annie Track
trails.description: One of the most popular day trips in the park is the climb to Mountain House Shelter along the easy grade of the Gentle Annie Track.

trails.name: Holdsworth roadend to Powell Hut/Mount Holdsworth
trails.description: This tramp follows the Mount Holdsworth Track to Powell Hut. From the rocky outcrop below the hut you get a view of High Ridge and Totara Flats far below.

trails.name: Kahikatea Walk
trails.description: This easy walk is a great introduction to broadleaved forest suitable for young and old.

trails.name: Kapakapanui Track
trails.description: The open summit of Kapakapanui is one of the best viewpoints in the Tararua Range.

trails.name: Kiriwhakapapa Loop
trails.description: This loop walk passes through regenerated native forest - it's well-graded and suitable for children.

trails.name: Kohekohe Walk
trails.description: Kohekohe Walk in Hemi Matenga Memorial Park Scenic Reserve is suitable for people of all ages and fitness levels.

trails.name: Kumeti Road end tramping tracks
trails.description: From Kumeti Road end in Eastern Ruahine Forest Park you can take tramping tracks to Opawe Rd and Kiritaki Hut.

trails.name: Maharahara Peak Track
trails.description: Take a steep climb through forest to the rocky open knolls of Maharahara high point in the Ruahine Forest Park.

trails.name: Manawatu Gorge Loop Track
trails.description: This is an easy loop walk through bush a short distance from Palmerston North - it's a good option for families with children.

trails.name: Manawatu Gorge Track
trails.description: Walk through native bush, enjoy scenic views and experience native wildlife only a short distance from Palmerston North.

trails.name: Mangahao Makahika Track
trails.description: The Mangahao Makahika Track connects Burtton's Track, which lies between Palmerston North and Shannon, with the Arapaepae Lookout Trail near Levin. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Mangaone Walkway
trails.description: Mangaone Walkway follows an old bush tramway in low hill country east of Waikanae. It was historically known as Reikorangi Track.

trails.name: Mid Pohangina Hut Track
trails.description: Cross private farmland by prior arrangement only. Once in the Ruahine Forest Park, sidle high above the picturesque Pohangina River before crossing the river and heading to the hut.

trails.name: Mitre Flats Track
trails.description: The Barra Track follows the Waingawa River to Mitre Flats and Mitre Flats Hut.

trails.name: Mt Holdsworth - Jumbo Circuit
trails.description: The classic Mt Holdsworth - Jumbo Circuit is a two to three day tramp involving a climb through beech-podocarp forest to some of the best alpine tops travel in the Tararua Forest Park.

trails.name: No.1 Line tracks
trails.description: Enjoy the views of the Pohangina Valley from the end of No.1 Line or shorter Trig Loop Track.

trails.name: Ōtaki Forks short walks
trails.description: These easy walks are great for kids - there's a campground and hut nearby to stay at too.

trails.name: Papaitonga Scenic Reserve walks
trails.description: Take a short, easy walk around a dune lake with some great spots to enjoy views and look for and listen to birds – it's a good option for kids.

trails.name: Parata Tramping Track
trails.description: The Parata Tramping Track is generally well-formed but has some sections that may be rough, muddy or steep. We recommend a moderate level of fitness and light tramping/hiking boots.

trails.name: Pukeatua Track
trails.description: Pukeatua Track connects Otaki Forks to Waikanae. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Rocky Lookout
trails.description: Walk up to a viewing platform for extensive views of the surrounding area.

trails.name: Te Arapiki o Tawhaki
trails.description: Experience stunning views and native bush on Te Arapiki o Tawhaki at Pukaha/Mount Bruce.

trails.name: Te Au Track
trails.description: The track climbs to 521 m and offers panoramic views of the Waikanae Estuary and Kapiti Island.

trails.name: Waitewaewae Hut Track
trails.description: The track to Waitewaewae Hut crosses a terrace above the Otaki River, before entering the bush to follow an old tramway and criss-cross several creeks. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Mangaone Walkway
trails.description: Mangaone Walkway follows an old bush tramway in low hill country east of Waikanae. It was historically known as Reikorangi Track.

trails.name: Te Motu o Poutoa / Anzac Park
